title: coreocarpus arizonicus var. sanpedroensis
intro: Coreocarpus arizonicus var. sanpedroensis, commonly known as San Pedro Desert Willow, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreocarpus arizonicus var. sanpedroensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
